title: Attribute Backport
body:
This mod backports some of the new attributes introduced in 1.21 to 1.20.1.

The current attributes are:
- `attribute-backport:player.block_break_speed`
- `attribute-backport:player.block_interaction_range`
- `attribute-backport:player.entity_interaction_range`
- `attribute-backport:player.submerged_mining_speed`
- `attribute-backport:player.mining_efficiency`
- `attribute-backport:player.sneaking_speed`
- `attribute-backport:player.sweeping_damage_ratio`
- `attribute-backport:generic.explosion_knockback_resistance`
- `attribute-backport:generic.oxygen_bonus`
- `attribute-backport:generic.burning_time`
- `attribute-backport:generic.water_movement_efficiency`
